summary: A holiday cyber-safety PSA in which a CISA spokesperson wearing an ugly Christmas sweater speaks cheerfully to camera in front of a CISA step-and-repeat backdrop, advising viewers to use multi-factor authentication, shop trusted sources, and avoid phishing, ending at cisa.gov/shopsafely. Despite the lighthearted holiday costume, it is a single-speaker talking-head PSA driven by speech rather than a music track, with a static setting and no cinematic/genre styling, so it is out of scope.
